message.content:
Explore the SDUI implementation in this project. I need to understand:

1. What's in src/services/sdui/adapters/ (if anything exists)
2. The registry API at src/services/sdui/registry/index.ts
3. The ScreenRenderer at src/services/sdui/renderer/ScreenRenderer.tsx
4. The SDUI types at src/services/sdui/models/index.ts
5. How DS components are imported — check src/__stories__/DSComponentValidation.stories.tsx for examples
6. Check existing screens for how DS components are used:
   - src/screens/InvoiceCashbackPoints/view.tsx
   - src/screens/InvoiceCashbackSummary/view.tsx
   - src/screens/InvoiceCashbackOnboarding/index.tsx

Read ALL these files fully. I need the complete picture to create SDUI adapters that map JSON props to DS component props.

content.text: I'll explore the SDUI implementation systematically by reading all the requested files.

input.description: List files in the SDUI adapters directory

1→import React, { useState, useRef } from 'react';
     2→import { View, ScrollView } from 'react-native';
     3→import {
     4→  Text,
     5→  Button,
     6→  Box,
     7→  InputBox,
     8→  Alert,
     9→  Icon,
    10→  ListTextIcon,
    11→  SeparatorHorizontal,
    12→  BackDropBottom,
    13→  Loading,
    14→} from '@semparar/design-system-app';
    15→import type { Meta, StoryObj } from 'storybook/internal/types';
    16→
    17→function StatusBadge({ status }: { status: 'ok' | 'fail' | 'warn' }) {
    18→  const colors = { ok: '#22c55e', fail: '#ef4444', warn: '#f59e0b' };
    19→  const labels = { ok: 'RENDERS', fail: 'FAILS', warn: 'PARTIAL' };
    20→  return (
    21→    <View
    22→      style={{
    23→        backgroundColor: colors[status],
    24→        paddingHorizontal: 8,
    25→        paddingVertical: 2,
    26→        borderRadius: 4,
    27→        alignSelf: 'flex-start',
    28→        marginBottom: 8,
    29→      }}
    30→    >
    31→      <Text type="bodySM" color="INTENSE_COLOR_01">
    32→        {labels[status]}
    33→      </Text>
    34→    </View>
    35→  );
    36→}
    37→
    38→function Section({
    39→  title,
    40→  children,
    41→}: {
    42→  title: string;
    43→  children: React.ReactNode;
    44→}) {
    45→  return (
    46→    <View style={{ marginBottom: 32 }}>
    47→      <Text type="subtitleXXL" mb="smaller">
    48→        {title}
    49→      </Text>
    50→      <Box
    51→        pd="squishSmall"
    52→        bgColor="LIGHT_BASE_02"
    53→        br="sm"
    54→        bw="thin"
    55→        borderColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_02"
    56→      >
    57→        {children}
    58→      </Box>
    59→    </View>
    60→  );
    61→}
    62→
    63→function TextValidation() {
    64→  return (
    65→    <Section title="1. Text">
    66→      <StatusBadge status="ok" />
    67→      <Text type="headingMDL" mb="nano">
    68→        headingMDL — Form titles
    69→      </Text>
    70→      <Text type="subtitleXXL" mb="nano">
    71→        subtitleXXL — Section headings
    72→      </Text>
    73→      <Text type="bodyMD" mb="nano">
    74→        bodyMD — Body text
    75→      </Text>
    76→      <Text type="paragraphMD" mb="nano">
    77→        paragraphMD — Descriptions
    78→      </Text>
    79→      <Text type="bodySM" mb="nano" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03">
    80→        bodySM + color — Secondary text
    81→      </Text>
    82→      <Text
    83→        type="bodyMD"
    84→        color="PRYMARY_BASE_02"
    85→        underline
    86→        onPress={() => {}}
    87→      >
    88→        Pressable + underline — Link style
    89→      </Text>
    90→    </Section>
    91→  );
    92→}
    93→
    94→function ButtonValidation() {
    95→  return (
    96→    <Section title="2. Button">
    97→      <StatusBadge status="ok" />
    98→      <Button text="Primary Large (default)" onPress={() => {}} mb="nano" />
    99→      <Button
   100→        text="Disabled State"
   101→        onPress={() => {}}
   102→        disabled
   103→        mb="nano"
   104→      />
   105→      <Button
   106→        text="With Icon"
   107→        onPress={() => {}}
   108→        icon="icon-check"
   109→        mb="nano"
   110→      />
   111→      <Button
   112→        text="Loading State"
   113→        onPress={() => {}}
   114→        isLoading
   115→      />
   116→    </Section>
   117→  );
   118→}
   119→
   120→function BoxValidation() {
   121→  return (
   122→    <Section title="3. Box">
   123→      <StatusBadge status="ok" />
   124→      <Box
   125→        pd="squishSmall"
   126→        bgColor="PRYMARY_BASE_01"
   127→        br="md"
   128→        mb="nano"
   129→      >
   130→        <Text type="bodySM" color="INTENSE_COLOR_01">
   131→          Box with bgColor, padding, borderRadius
   132→        </Text>
   133→      </Box>
   134→      <Box direction align="center" mb="nano">
   135→        <Box
   136→          pd="squishSmall"
   137→          bgColor="LIGHT_BASE_02"
   138→          br="sm"
   139→          mr="nano"
   140→          flex={1}
   141→        >
   142→          <Text type="bodySM">Row item 1</Text>
   143→        </Box>
   144→        <Box pd="squishSmall" bgColor="LIGHT_BASE_02" br="sm" flex={1}>
   145→          <Text type="bodySM">Row item 2</Text>
   146→        </Box>
   147→      </Box>
   148→      <Box
   149→        pd="innerMedium"
   150→        bw="thin"
   151→        borderColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_02"
   152→        br="sm"
   153→      >
   154→        <Text type="bodySM">Box with border</Text>
   155→      </Box>
   156→    </Section>
   157→  );
   158→}
   159→
   160→function InputBoxValidation() {
   161→  const [value1, setValue1] = useState('');
   162→  const [value2, setValue2] = useState('');
   163→  const [value3, setValue3] = useState('');
   164→
   165→  return (
   166→    <Section title="4. InputBox">
   167→      <StatusBadge status="ok" />
   168→      <InputBox
   169→        label="Valor em pontos"
   170→        placeholder="0"
   171→        showLabel
   172→        keyboardType="number-pad"
   173→        value={value1}
   174→        onChangeText={setValue1}
   175→        mb="nano"
   176→      />
   177→      <InputBox
   178→        label="Valor em reais"
   179→        placeholder="R$ 0,00"
   180→        showLabel
   181→        keyboardType="decimal-pad"
   182→        value={value2}
   183→        onChangeText={setValue2}
   184→        textRight="Usar todos"
   185→        onPressTextRight={() => setValue2('100')}
   186→        mb="nano"
   187→      />
   188→      <InputBox
   189→        label="With error"
   190→        placeholder="Type something"
   191→        showLabel
   192→        value={value3}
   193→        onChangeText={setValue3}
   194→        error
   195→        textError="Valor excede o saldo disponível"
   196→      />
   197→    </Section>
   198→  );
   199→}
   200→
   201→function AlertValidation() {
   202→  return (
   203→    <Section title="5. Alert">
   204→      <StatusBadge status="ok" />
   205→      <Alert
   206→        label="O valor é aplicado e exibido nos lançamentos da sua fatura aberta."
   207→        type="highlight"
   208→        icon="icon-calendar"
   209→        mb="nano"
   210→      />
   211→      <Alert
   212→        label="Resgate realizado com sucesso!"
   213→        type="success"
   214→        icon="icon-check"
   215→        mb="nano"
   216→      />
   217→      <Alert
   218→        label="Erro ao processar sua solicitação."
   219→        type="error"
   220→        icon="icon-help"
   221→        mb="nano"
   222→      />
   223→      <Alert
   224→        label="Atenção: valor mínimo de 100 pontos."
   225→        type="alert"
   226→        icon="icon-help"
   227→      />
   228→    </Section>
   229→  );
   230→}
   231→
   232→function IconValidation() {
   233→  return (
   234→    <Section title="6. Icon">
   235→      <StatusBadge status="ok" />
   236→      <Box direction align="center" mb="nano">
   237→        <Icon name="icon-check" size="md" color="PRYMARY_BASE_02" mr="nano" />
   238→        <Icon
   239→          name="icon-calendar"
   240→          size="md"
   241→          color="BRAND_BASE_01"
   242→          mr="nano"
   243→        />
   244→        <Icon name="icon-help" size="md" color="INTENSE_COLOR_05" mr="nano" />
   245→        <Icon
   246→          name="icon-switch-vertical"
   247→          size="md"
   248→          color="INTENSE_COLOR_03"
   249→        />
   250→      </Box>
   251→      <Box direction align="center">
   252→        <Icon
   253→          name="icon-check"
   254→          size="sm"
   255→          color="BRAND_BASE_01"
   256→          hasBackground
   257→          backgroundType="circle"
   258→          bgColorCircle="INTENSE_COLOR_01"
   259→          hasBackgroundCircle
   260→          mr="nano"
   261→        />
   262→        <Text type="bodySM">Icon with circle background</Text>
   263→      </Box>
   264→    </Section>
   265→  );
   266→}
   267→
   268→function ListTextIconValidation() {
   269→  return (
   270→    <Section title="7. ListTextIcon">
   271→      <StatusBadge status="ok" />
   272→      <ListTextIcon
   273→        items={[
   274→          {
   275→            icon: 'icon-switch-vertical',
   276→            iconColor: 'BRAND_BASE_01',
   277→            iconColorShape: 'INTENSE_COLOR_01',
   278→            description: 'Cada 100 pontos valem R$ 1,00 no voucher',
   279→            hasBackgroundIcon: true,
   280→          },
   281→          {
   282→            icon: 'icon-calendar',
   283→            iconColor: 'BRAND_BASE_01',
   284→            iconColorShape: 'INTENSE_COLOR_01',
   285→            description: 'Você define quanto desconto quer no abastecimento',
   286→            hasBackgroundIcon: true,
   287→          },
   288→          {
   289→            icon: 'icon-check',
   290→            iconColor: 'BRAND_BASE_01',
   291→            iconColorShape: 'INTENSE_COLOR_01',
   292→            description: 'Após o resgate, o voucher fica disponível no app',
   293→            hasBackgroundIcon: true,
   294→          },
   295→        ]}
   296→        type="list"
   297→      />
   298→    </Section>
   299→  );
   300→}
   301→
   302→function SeparatorValidation() {
   303→  return (
   304→    <Section title="8. SeparatorHorizontal">
   305→      <StatusBadge status="ok" />
   306→      <Text type="bodySM" mb="nano">
   307→        Content before separator
   308→      </Text>
   309→      <SeparatorHorizontal
   310→        mb="nano"
   311→        mt="nano"
   312→        bgColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_02"
   313→        height={1}
   314→        width="100%"
   315→      />
   316→      <Text type="bodySM">Content after separator</Text>
   317→    </Section>
   318→  );
   319→}
   320→
   321→function BackDropBottomValidation() {
   322→  return (
   323→    <Section title="9. BackDropBottom">
   324→      <StatusBadge status="warn" />
   325→      <Text type="bodySM" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03" mb="nano">
   326→        BackDropBottom depends on react-native-modalize which requires native
   327→        modules (GestureHandler, Animated). It will NOT render in the Storybook
   328→        web context. Use a plain View/ScrollView wrapper as substitute for
   329→        SDUI stories.
   330→      </Text>
   331→    </Section>
   332→  );
   333→}
   334→
   335→function LoadingValidation() {
   336→  return (
   337→    <Section title="10. Loading">
   338→      <StatusBadge status="warn" />
   339→      <Text type="bodySM" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03" mb="nano">
   340→        Loading depends on lottie-react-native which requires native Lottie
   341→        bindings. It will NOT render in the Storybook web context. Use a
   342→        simple ActivityIndicator or Text fallback for SDUI stories.
   343→      </Text>
   344→    </Section>
   345→  );
   346→}
   347→
   348→function DSComponentValidation() {
   349→  return (
   350→    <ScrollView style={{ flex: 1 }}>
   351→      <View style={{ padding: 24, maxWidth: 480 }}>
   352→        <Text type="headingMDL" mb="smaller">
   353→          DS Component Validation — SP_0001.1
   354→        </Text>
   355→        <Text type="bodyMD" mb="smaller" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03">
   356→          Validates all @semparar/design-system-app components used in voucher
   357→          screens. Each section shows the component with realistic props matching
   358→          InvoiceCashback screen usage.
   359→        </Text>
   360→        <SeparatorHorizontal
   361→          mb="smaller"
   362→          bgColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_02"
   363→          height={1}
   364→          width="100%"
   365→        />
   366→        <TextValidation />
   367→        <ButtonValidation />
   368→        <BoxValidation />
   369→        <InputBoxValidation />
   370→        <AlertValidation />
   371→        <IconValidation />
   372→        <ListTextIconValidation />
   373→        <SeparatorValidation />
   374→        <BackDropBottomValidation />
   375→        <LoadingValidation />
   376→
   377→        <Box pd="squishSmall" bgColor="LIGHT_BASE_02" br="sm" mt="smaller">
   378→          <Text type="subtitleXXL" mb="nano">
   379→            Summary
   380→          </Text>
   381→          <Text type="bodyMD" mb="nano">
   382→            8/10 components render correctly in Storybook web context.
   383→          </Text>
   384→          <Text type="bodySM" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03">
   385→            BackDropBottom (Modalize) and Loading (Lottie) require native modules
   386→            and cannot render on web. SDUI adapters should provide web-safe
   387→            fallbacks for these two components.
   388→          </Text>
   389→        </Box>
   390→      </View>
   391→    </ScrollView>
   392→  );
   393→}
   394→
   395→const meta: Meta<typeof DSComponentValidation> = {
   396→  title: 'Validation/DS Components',
   397→  component: DSComponentValidation,
   398→};
   399→
   400→export default meta;
   401→
   402→type Story = StoryObj<typeof meta>;
   403→
   404→export const AllComponents: Story = {};
   405→

1→import {
     2→  BackDropBottom,
     3→  Box,
     4→  Button,
     5→  Icon,
     6→  InputBox,
     7→  ListTextIcon,
     8→  Text,
     9→} from '@semparar/design-system-app';
    10→import React, { FC } from 'react';
    11→import BasicScreen from '../../atomic/templates/BasicScreen';
    12→import { Skeleton } from '../../components/TransactionsListFactory/styles';
    13→import { formatCurrencyBR, getFormattedPoints } from '../../utils/functions';
    14→import { InvoiceCashbackViewProps } from './models';
    15→
    16→const InvoiceCashbackPointsView: FC<InvoiceCashbackViewProps> = ({
    17→  handleGoBack,
    18→  handleContinue,
    19→  points,
    20→  formattedPrice,
    21→  handleChangeReais,
    22→  handleChangePoints,
    23→  handleUseAll,
    24→  pointsValue,
    25→  reaisValue,
    26→  convertionValue,
    27→  pointsError,
    28→  reaisError,
    29→  items,
    30→  pointsQuantity,
    31→  handleModalizeContinue,
    32→  onOpenDefault,
    33→  modalizeRef1,
    34→  handleSelectEvent,
    35→  height,
    36→  width,
    37→  isLoadingParameterization,
    38→}) => {
    39→  return (
    40→    <BasicScreen
    41→      hasScroll
    42→      hasHeader
    43→      bgColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_03"
    44→      leftIconOnPress={handleGoBack}
    45→      title="Cashback na fatura"
    46→      hasRightIcon
    47→      rightIcon="icon-help"
    48→      rightIconOnPress={onOpenDefault}
    49→      errorButtonOnPress={() => {}}
    50→      isLoading={false}
    51→    >
    52→      <Box ml="smaller" mr="smaller" flex={1} justify="flex-start">
    53→        <Text
    54→          color="INTENSE_COLOR_05"
    55→          testID="invoice-cashback-main-title"
    56→          type="headingMDL"
    57→          mt="smaller"
    58→        >
    59→          Defina quanto cashback quer na sua fatura
    60→        </Text>
    61→
    62→        <Box direction mb="smaller" mt="nano" align="center">
    63→          <Text type="paragraphMD" mr="quark">
    64→            Pontos disponíveis:
    65→          </Text>
    66→          <Text type="paragraphXXXL" mr="quark">
    67→            {getFormattedPoints(points || 0)}
    68→          </Text>
    69→          <Text type="paragraphMD">({formattedPrice})</Text>
    70→        </Box>
    71→
    72→        <InputBox
    73→          label="Valor em pontos"
    74→          placeholder="0"
    75→          showLabel
    76→          keyboardType="number-pad"
    77→          value={pointsValue}
    78→          onPressIn={() => handleSelectEvent('campo_pontos')}
    79→          onChangeText={handleChangePoints}
    80→          error={pointsError}
    81→          textError="Você precisa informar um valor menor."
    82→          textRight="Usar todos"
    83→          onPressTextRight={handleUseAll}
    84→        />
    85→
    86→        <Box direction mb="xxs" mt="xxs" align="center">
    87→          <Box height="1px" bgColor="INTENSE_COLOR_02" width="45%" />
    88→          <Icon
    89→            name="icon-switch-vertical"
    90→            size="xxs"
    91→            color="INTENSE_COLOR_03"
    92→            mr="nano"
    93→            ml="nano"
    94→          />
    95→          <Box height="1px" bgColor="INTENSE_COLOR_02" width="45%" />
    96→        </Box>
    97→
    98→        <InputBox
    99→          label="Valor em reais"
   100→          placeholder="R$0,00"
   101→          showLabel
   102→          keyboardType="decimal-pad"
   103→          onPressIn={() => handleSelectEvent('campo_valor')}
   104→          value={reaisValue}
   105→          onChangeText={handleChangeReais}
   106→          error={reaisError}
   107→          textError="Você precisa informar um valor menor."
   108→        />
   109→        {isLoadingParameterization && (
   110→          <Box direction mb="xxs" mt="xxs" align="center">
   111→            <Skeleton width={width - 40} height={60} />
   112→          </Box>
   113→        )}
   114→        {!isLoadingParameterization && (
   115→          <Box direction mb="xxs" mt="xxs" align="center">
   116→            <Text type="paragraphMD">
   117→              Cada {pointsQuantity || '0'} pontos valem{' '}
   118→              {convertionValue || formatCurrencyBR(0)} de cashback na fatura.
   119→            </Text>
   120→          </Box>
   121→        )}
   122→      </Box>
   123→      <Box ml="smaller" mr="smaller">
   124→        <Button
   125→          disabled={
   126→            pointsValue === '' ||
   127→            reaisValue === '' ||
   128→            pointsValue === '0' ||
   129→            reaisValue === '0' ||
   130→            pointsError ||
   131→            reaisError
   132→          }
   133→          text="Continuar"
   134→          mt="large"
   135→          mb="small"
   136→          onPress={handleContinue}
   137→          testID="invoice-cashback-button"
   138→        />
   139→      </Box>
   140→      <BackDropBottom modalHeight={height * 0.53} modalizeRef={modalizeRef1}>
   141→        <Text type="subtitleXXL" mb="smaller" mt="smaller" align="center">
   142→          Use seus pontos para pagar menos na fatura
   143→        </Text>
   144→
   145→        <ListTextIcon
   146→          items={items}
   147→          ml="nano"
   148→          mr="nano"
   149→          type="list"
   150→          mb="smaller"
   151→        />
   152→
   153→        <Button text="Entendi" onPress={handleModalizeContinue} />
   154→      </BackDropBottom>
   155→    </BasicScreen>
   156→  );
   157→};
   158→
   159→export default InvoiceCashbackPointsView;
   160→

1→import {
     2→  Alert,
     3→  BackDropBottom,
     4→  Box,
     5→  Button,
     6→  Icon,
     7→  ListTextIcon,
     8→  Loading,
     9→  SeparatorHorizontal,
    10→  Text,
    11→} from '@semparar/design-system-app';
    12→import { FC } from 'react';
    13→
    14→import React from 'react';
    15→import BasicScreen from '../../atomic/templates/BasicScreen';
    16→import { InvoiceCashbackViewProps } from './models';
    17→
    18→const InvoiceCashbackSummaryView: FC<InvoiceCashbackViewProps> = ({
    19→  handleGoBack,
    20→  onConfirmRescue,
    21→  onExitResult,
    22→  isRescueLoading,
    23→  isRescueConcluded,
    24→  isRescueFailed,
    25→  items,
    26→  effectiveShowResult,
    27→  onOpenDefault,
    28→  modalizeRef1,
    29→  formattedSelectedPoints,
    30→  formattedSelectedReais,
    31→  screenTitle,
    32→  height,
    33→}) => {
    34→  return (
    35→    <BasicScreen
    36→      hasScroll
    37→      hasHeader
    38→      bgColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_03"
    39→      leftIconOnPress={handleGoBack}
    40→      title={screenTitle ?? ''}
    41→      hasRightIcon={!effectiveShowResult}
    42→      rightIcon="icon-help"
    43→      rightIconOnPress={onOpenDefault}
    44→      errorButtonOnPress={() => {}}
    45→      isLoading={false}
    46→    >
    47→      {!effectiveShowResult ? (
    48→        <>
    49→          <Box ml="smaller" mr="smaller" flex={1} justify="flex-start">
    50→            <Text
    51→              color="INTENSE_COLOR_05"
    52→              testID="invoice-cashback-main-title"
    53→              type="headingMDL"
    54→              mt="smaller"
    55→              mb="small"
    56→            >
    57→              Revise as informações para confirmar o cashback
    58→            </Text>
    59→
    60→            <Text
    61→              color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
    62→              type="paragraphMDM"
    63→              colorBold="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
    64→              mb="nano"
    65→            >
    66→              Valor em pontos
    67→            </Text>
    68→
    69→            <Text
    70→              color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
    71→              type="paragraphL"
    72→              colorBold="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
    73→              mt="nano"
    74→              mb="xxs"
    75→            >
    76→              {formattedSelectedPoints}
    77→            </Text>
    78→
    79→            <SeparatorHorizontal
    80→              mb="xxs"
    81→              bgColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_02"
    82→              height={1}
    83→              width="100%"
    84→            />
    85→
    86→            <Text
    87→              color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
    88→              type="paragraphMDM"
    89→              colorBold="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
    90→              mb="nano"
    91→            >
    92→              Valor em reais
    93→            </Text>
    94→
    95→            <Text
    96→              color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
    97→              type="paragraphL"
    98→              colorBold="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
    99→              mt="nano"
   100→              mb="xxs"
   101→            >
   102→              {formattedSelectedReais}
   103→            </Text>
   104→
   105→            <SeparatorHorizontal
   106→              mb="xxs"
   107→              bgColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_02"
   108→              height={1}
   109→              width="100%"
   110→            />
   111→
   112→            <Text
   113→              align="left"
   114→              color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
   115→              type="paragraphMDM"
   116→              colorBold="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
   117→              mb="nano"
   118→            >
   119→              Cashback em
   120→            </Text>
   121→
   122→            <Text
   123→              color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
   124→              type="paragraphL"
   125→              colorBold="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
   126→              mt="nano"
   127→              mb="xxs"
   128→            >
   129→              Até 72h
   130→            </Text>
   131→
   132→            <Alert
   133→              label="O valor é aplicado e exibido nos lançamentos da sua fatura aberta."
   134→              type="highlight"
   135→              icon="icon-calendar"
   136→            />
   137→          </Box>
   138→
   139→          <Box ml="smaller" mr="smaller">
   140→            <Button
   141→              text="Confirmar desconto"
   142→              mt="large"
   143→              mb="small"
   144→              onPress={onConfirmRescue}
   145→              disabled={!!isRescueLoading}
   146→              testID="invoice-cashback-button"
   147→            />
   148→
   149→            <Loading title="Aguarde..." visible={!!isRescueLoading} />
   150→          </Box>
   151→        </>
   152→      ) : (
   153→        <>
   154→          {isRescueConcluded && !isRescueFailed && (
   155→            <>
   156→              <Box
   157→                ml="smaller"
   158→                mr="smaller"
   159→                flex={1}
   160→                justify="center"
   161→                align="center"
   162→              >
   163→                <Box
   164→                  bgColor="PLUS_COLOR_03"
   165→                  borderColor="PLUS_COLOR_01"
   166→                  borderRadiusBottomLeft="medium"
   167→                  pd="innerMedium"
   168→                  borderRadiusBottomRight="medium"
   169→                  borderRadiusTopRight="medium"
   170→                  borderRadiusTopLeft="medium"
   171→                  borderBottomWidth="small"
   172→                  borderTopWidth="small"
   173→                  borderLeftWidth="small"
   174→                  borderRightWidth="small"
   175→                  mb="small"
   176→                >
   177→                  <Icon name="icon-check" color="PLUS_COLOR_01" size="sm" />
   178→                </Box>
   179→
   180→                <Text type="subtitleXXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="small">
   181→                  Cashback aplicado
   182→                </Text>
   183→
   184→                <Text
   185→                  align="center"
   186→                  type="paragraphLG"
   187→                  color="INTENSE_COLOR_03"
   188→                  mb="small"
   189→                >
   190→                  O valor será aplicado em até 72h na sua fatura aberta.
   191→                </Text>
   192→              </Box>
   193→
   194→              <Box ml="smaller" mr="smaller">
   195→                <Button
   196→                  text="Ir para o início"
   197→                  mt="large"
   198→                  mb="small"
   199→                  onPress={onExitResult}
   200→                  testID="invoice-cashback-result-success-button"
   201→                />
   202→              </Box>
   203→            </>
   204→          )}
   205→          {!isRescueConcluded && isRescueFailed && (
   206→            <>
   207→              <Box
   208→                ml="smaller"
   209→                mr="smaller"
   210→                flex={1}
   211→                justify="center"
   212→                align="center"
   213→              >
   214→                <Box
   215→                  bgColor="DENY_COLOR_03"
   216→                  borderColor="DENY_COLOR_01"
   217→                  borderRadiusBottomLeft="medium"
   218→                  pd="innerMedium"
   219→                  borderRadiusBottomRight="medium"
   220→                  borderRadiusTopRight="medium"
   221→                  borderRadiusTopLeft="medium"
   222→                  borderBottomWidth="small"
   223→                  borderTopWidth="small"
   224→                  borderLeftWidth="small"
   225→                  borderRightWidth="small"
   226→                  mb="small"
   227→                >
   228→                  <Icon
   229→                    name="icon-circle-alert"
   230→                    color="DENY_COLOR_01"
   231→                    size="sm"
   232→                  />
   233→                </Box>
   234→
   235→                <Text type="subtitleXXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="small">
   236→                  Algo deu errado!
   237→                </Text>
   238→
   239→                <Text type="paragraphLG" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03" mb="small">
   240→                  Por favor, tente mais tarde.
   241→                </Text>
   242→              </Box>
   243→
   244→              <Box ml="smaller" mr="smaller">
   245→                <Button
   246→                  text="Voltar"
   247→                  mt="large"
   248→                  mb="small"
   249→                  onPress={onExitResult}
   250→                  testID="invoice-cashback-result-failed-button"
   251→                />
   252→              </Box>
   253→            </>
   254→          )}
   255→        </>
   256→      )}
   257→
   258→      <BackDropBottom modalHeight={height * 0.53} modalizeRef={modalizeRef1}>
   259→        <Text type="subtitleXXL" mb="smaller" mt="smaller" align="center">
   260→          Use seus pontos para pagar menos na fatura
   261→        </Text>
   262→
   263→        <ListTextIcon
   264→          items={items}
   265→          ml="nano"
   266→          mr="nano"
   267→          type="list"
   268→          mb="smaller"
   269→        />
   270→
   271→        <Button
   272→          text="Entendi"
   273→          onPress={() => {
   274→            modalizeRef1.current?.close?.();
   275→          }}
   276→        />
   277→      </BackDropBottom>
   278→    </BasicScreen>
   279→  );
   280→};
   281→
   282→export default InvoiceCashbackSummaryView;
   283→

content.text: Now let me read all the adapter files to see what's been implemented.
Let me also check the interpolation utilities and the FallbackComponent.

content.content:
1→import { Box, Button, ListTextIcon, Text } from '@semparar/design-system-app';
     2→import React, { FC } from 'react';
     3→import BasicScreen from '../../atomic/templates/BasicScreen';
     4→import { Skeleton } from '../../components/TransactionsListFactory/styles';
     5→import { InvoiceCashbackViewProps } from './models';
     6→
     7→const InvoiceCashbackView: FC<InvoiceCashbackViewProps> = ({
     8→  items,
     9→  hasError,
    10→  hasLoading,
    11→  handleGoBack,
    12→  handleContinue,
    13→  handleRetry,
    14→  cashbackInvoiceList,
    15→  isLoadingParameterization,
    16→  width,
    17→}) => {
    18→  return (
    19→    <BasicScreen
    20→      hasScroll
    21→      hasHeader
    22→      bgColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_03"
    23→      leftIconOnPress={handleGoBack}
    24→      title="Cashback na fatura"
    25→      hasRightIcon={false}
    26→      errorButtonOnPress={handleRetry}
    27→      isLoading={hasLoading}
    28→      hasError={hasError}
    29→    >
    30→      <Box ml="smaller" mr="smaller">
    31→        <Text
    32→          color="INTENSE_COLOR_05"
    33→          testID="invoice-cashback-main-title"
    34→          type="headingMDL"
    35→          mt="smaller"
    36→        >
    37→          Use pontos para pagar menos na fatura
    38→        </Text>
    39→      </Box>
    40→      {isLoadingParameterization &&
    41→        cashbackInvoiceList?.map?.((_, index) => (
    42→          <Box pd="innerLarge" key={`skeleton-${index}`}>
    43→            <Skeleton width={width - 40} height={60} />
    44→          </Box>
    45→        ))}
    46→      {!isLoadingParameterization && (
    47→        <>
    48→          <Box ml="nano" mr="nano" flex={1} justify="flex-start">
    49→            <ListTextIcon
    50→              items={items}
    51→              ml="nano"
    52→              mr="xs"
    53→              mt="xxs"
    54→              type="list"
    55→            />
    56→          </Box>
    57→
    58→          <Box ml="smaller" mr="smaller">
    59→            <Button
    60→              text="Continuar"
    61→              mt="large"
    62→              mb="small"
    63→              onPress={handleContinue}
    64→              testID="invoice-cashback-button"
    65→            />
    66→          </Box>
    67→        </>
    68→      )}
    69→    </BasicScreen>
    70→  );
    71→};
    72→
    73→export default InvoiceCashbackView;
    74→

1→import React from 'react';
     2→import { ScrollView, View } from 'react-native';
     3→import { Text, Box, SeparatorHorizontal } from '@semparar/design-system-app';
     4→import type { Meta, StoryObj } from 'storybook/internal/types';
     5→import type { SDUIScreen } from '../services/sdui/models';
     6→import { registerAllAdapters } from '../services/sdui/adapters';
     7→import ScreenRenderer from '../services/sdui/renderer/ScreenRenderer';
     8→
     9→registerAllAdapters();
    10→
    11→const adapterDemoScreen: SDUIScreen = {
    12→  id: 'adapter-demo',
    13→  context: {
    14→    product: { name: 'Abastecimento' },

    42→        keyboardType: 'number-pad',
    43→        textRight: 'Usar todos',
    44→        textError: 'Valor excede o saldo disponível',

    76→      },

    78→    {
    79→      type: 'section_heading',
    80→      props: {
    81→        text: 'Como funciona',
    82→        mb: 'nano',
    83→      },
    84→    },
    85→    {
    86→      type: 'list_text_icon',
    87→      props: {
    88→        items: [
    89→          {
    90→            icon: 'icon-switch-vertical',
    91→            iconColor: 'BRAND_BASE_01',
    92→            iconColorShape: 'INTENSE_COLOR_01',
    93→            description: 'Cada 100 pontos valem R$ 1,00 no voucher',
    94→            hasBackgroundIcon: true,
    95→          },
    96→          {
    97→            icon: 'icon-calendar',
    98→            iconColor: 'BRAND_BASE_01',
    99→            iconColorShape: 'INTENSE_COLOR_01',
   100→            description: 'Você define quanto desconto quer no {{product.name}}',
   101→            hasBackgroundIcon: true,
   102→          },
   103→          {
   104→            icon: 'icon-check',
   105→            iconColor: 'BRAND_BASE_01',
   106→            iconColorShape: 'INTENSE_COLOR_01',
   107→            description: 'Após o resgate, o voucher fica disponível no app',
   108→            hasBackgroundIcon: true,
   109→          },
   110→        ],
   111→        type: 'list',
   112→        mb: 'smaller',
   113→      },
   114→    },
   115→    {

   117→      props: {

   120→        text: 'Validade de 30 dias após criação',
   121→        mb: 'nano',
   122→      },
   123→    },
   124→    {
   125→      type: 'icon_text_row',
   126→      props: {

   128→        iconColor: 'PLUS_COLOR_01',
   129→        text: 'Desconto aplicado automaticamente no pedágio',
   130→        mb: 'nano',

   150→
   151→function SDUIAdaptersDemo() {
   152→  return (
   153→    <ScrollView style={{ flex: 1 }}>
   154→      <View style={{ padding: 24, maxWidth: 480 }}>
   155→        <Text type="headingMDL" mb="smaller">
   156→          SDUI Adapters Demo — SP_0002.3
   157→        </Text>
   158→        <Text type="bodyMD" mb="smaller" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03">
   159→          All 11 SDUI component adapters rendering through the ScreenRenderer
   160→          with interpolated context values.
   161→        </Text>
   162→        <SeparatorHorizontal
   163→          mb="smaller"
   164→          bgColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_02"
   165→          height={1}
   166→          width="100%"
   167→        />
   168→        <Box
   169→          pd="squishSmall"
   170→          bgColor="LIGHT_BASE_02"
   171→          br="sm"
   172→          bw="thin"
   173→          borderColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_02"
   174→        >
   175→          <ScreenRenderer screen={adapterDemoScreen} />
   176→        </Box>
   177→      </View>
   178→    </ScrollView>
   179→  );
   180→}
   181→
   182→const meta: Meta<typeof SDUIAdaptersDemo> = {
   183→  title: 'SDUI/Component Adapters',
   184→  component: SDUIAdaptersDemo,
   185→};
   186→
   187→export default meta;
   188→
   189→type Story = StoryObj<typeof meta>;
   190→
   191→export const AllAdapters: Story = {};
   192→

content.text: Let me also check the RFC document to understand the full SDUI architecture and check if there are any tests for the adapters.

content.content:
1→
     2→Proposta: Server Driven UI (SDUI): Um Padrão para Telas Parametrizáveis
     3→Status: Rascunho
     4→Versão: 1.0
     5→
     6→
     7→                              Resumo
     8→
     9→   Esta proposta descreve uma forma de estruturar o conteúdo das
    10→   telas parametrizáveis (vouchers, benefícios, resgates, etc)
    11→   de forma padronizada para reduzir a necessidade de deploy quando
    12→   há mudanças de texto, formatação ou ordem de elementos.
    13→
    14→   A proposta é baseada em padrões utilizados por empresas como
    15→   Airbnb, Nubank e DoorDash, adaptados para nossa realidade.
    16→
    17→
    18→Índice
    19→
    20→   1. Contexto
    21→   2. Proposta
    22→   3. Como Funciona
    23→      3.1. Estrutura de Tela
    24→      3.2. Componentes
    25→      3.3. Conteúdo Rico
    26→      3.4. Valores e Contexto
    27→      3.5. Regras e Condicionais
    28→   4. Exemplo: Tela de Voucher
    29→   5. Implementação
    30→   6. Referências
    31→
    32→
    33→1. Contexto
    34→
    35→   Muitas aplicações possuem telas parametrizáveis, funcionando como 
    36→   templates, que recebem dados do backend, definidos conforme a 
    37→   necessidade de cada template. Na prática, os valores são dinâmicos,
    38→   mas a estrutura não. A cada nova necessidade de alteração simples de
    39→   layout e formatação, como destacar um texto em negrito, um novo campo é
    40→   adicionado no JSON de resposta do servidor e uma nova regra condicional
    41→   (if) é adicionada no frontend, resultando em armazenamento de dados legados
    42→   e no acúmulo de código morto.
    43→
    44→2. Proposta: Padrão SDUI.
    45→    
    46→    É um padrão arquitetural no qual o backend define a lógica de exibição 
    47→    dos dados, indo além da definição de parâmetros textuais.
    48→
    49→    Empresas que usam esse padrão:
    50→
    51→        - Nubank: 70% das novas telas usam esse formato
    52→        - Airbnb: Busca, listagens e checkout
    53→        - DoorDash: Reduziu tempo de mudanças de semanas para horas
    54→
    55→3. Como Funciona
    56→
    57→3.1. Estrutura de Tela
    58→
    59→     Uma tela é composta por:
    60→
    61→     {
    62→       "screen": {
    63→         "id": "voucher_form",
    64→         "context": { ... },      // dados para usar nos componentes
    65→         "header": { ... },       // cabeçalho
    66→         "body": [ ... ],         // array de componentes
    67→         "footer": { ... }        // rodapé (botão de ação)
    68→       }
    69→     }
    70→
    71→     O body é um array. A ordem do array é a ordem na tela.
    72→
    73→3.2. Componentes
    74→
    75→     Cada componente tem um tipo e propriedades:
    76→
    77→     { "type": "heading", "props": { "text": "Título" } }
    78→     { "type": "input", "props": { "label": "Valor em pontos" } }
    79→     { "type": "button", "props": { "label": "Continuar" } }
    80→
    81→     O app tem um registro de componentes:
    82→
    83→     const Componentes = {
    84→       'heading': HeadingComponent,
    85→       'input': InputComponent,
    86→       'button': ButtonComponent,
    87→       'balance': BalanceComponent,
    88→       // ...
    89→     };
    90→
    91→     Quando recebe o JSON, renderiza cada item do array usando
    92→     o componente correspondente ao tipo.
    93→
    94→     Tipos que já temos no Design System podem ser mapeados
    95→     diretamente. Não precisa criar componentes novos.
    96→
    97→3.3. Conteúdo Rico
    98→
    99→     Para textos que precisam de formatação inline (negrito,
   100→     links, ícones), usamos uma estrutura de "nodes":
   101→
   102→     {
   103→       "type": "rich_text",
   104→       "children": [
   105→         { "type": "text", "value": "Confira os " },
   106→         { "type": "text", "value": "termos", "bold": true },
   107→         { "type": "text", "value": " ou " },
   108→         { "type": "link", "text": "fale conosco", "to": "app://suporte" }
   109→       ]
   110→     }
   111→
   112→     Por que não markdown?
   113→
   114→     Se usarmos [texto](url) para links e depois precisarmos
   115→     adicionar tracking ou confirmação, temos que refatorar o
   116→     parser.
   117→
   118→     Com nodes, é só adicionar uma propriedade:
   119→
   120→     {
   121→       "type": "link",
   122→       "text": "fale conosco",
   123→       "to": "app://suporte",
   124→       "trackEvent": "suporte_click"    // adicionado depois
   125→     }
   126→
   127→3.4. Valores e Contexto
   128→
   129→
   130→     O Backend envia os valores no campo context:
   131→     {
   132→       "context": {
   133→         "balance": {
   134→           "points": 25720,
   135→           "value": 7716.00
   136→         }
   137→       }
   138→     }
   139→
   140→
   141→     Para textos que dependem do contexto, usamos interpolação:
   142→
   143→     { "type": "heading", "props": { "text": "Voucher para {{product.name}}" } }
   144→
   145→     O app substitui {{product.name}} pelo valor do contexto.
   146→
   147→3.5. Regras e Condicionais
   148→
   149→     Para controlar visibilidade e habilitação, usamos regras
   150→     simples baseadas em JSON Logic:
   151→
   152→     Botão habilitado só quando valor > 0:
   153→
   154→     {
   155→       "type": "button",
   156→       "props": {
   157→         "label": "Continuar",
   158→         "enabled": {
   159→           "rule": { ">": [{ "var": "form.points" }, 0] }
   160→         }
   161→       }
   162→     }
   163→
   164→     Os operadores suportados são básicos:
   165→     - var (acesso a dados)
   166→     - ==, !=, >, <, >=, <= (comparação)
   167→     - and, or, ! (lógica)
   168→
   169→     Não tem loops, não tem eval, não tem risco.
   170→
   171→     Validação de inputs segue o mesmo padrão:
   172→
   173→     {
   174→       "type": "input",
   175→       "props": {
   176→         "id": "points",
   177→         "validation": {
   178→           "rules": [
   179→             {
   180→               "rule": { ">": [{ "var": "value" }, 0] },
   181→               "message": "Informe um valor maior que zero"
   182→             }
   183→           ]
   184→         }
   185→       }
   186→     }
   187→
   188→5. Exemplo: Tela de Voucher
   189→
   190→   Estrutura completa para a tela de voucher:
   191→
   192→   {
   193→     "screen": {
   194→       "id": "voucher_form",
   195→       "context": {
   196→         "product": {
   197→           "key": "abastecimento",
   198→           "name": "Abastecimento"
   199→         },
   200→         "balance": {
   201→           "points": 25720,
   202→           "pointsFormatted": "25.720",
   203→           "valueFormatted": "R$ 7.716,00"
   204→         }
   205→       },
   206→       "header": {
   207→         "type": "nav_header",
   208→         "props": {
   209→           "title": "Voucher para {{product.name}}",
   210→           "showBack": true
   211→         }
   212→       },
   213→       "body": [
   214→         {
   215→           "type": "heading",
   216→           "props": { "text": "Defina o desconto para seu {{product.key}}" }
   217→         },
   218→         {
   219→           "type": "balance_display",
   220→           "props": {
   221→             "label": "Pontos disponíveis",
   222→             "points": "{{balance.pointsFormatted}}",
   223→             "value": "{{balance.valueFormatted}}"
   224→           }
   225→         },
   226→         {
   227→           "type": "points_input",
   228→           "props": {
   229→             "id": "points",
   230→             "label": "Valor em pontos",
   231→             "type": "numeric"
   232→           }
   233→         },
   234→         {
   235→           "type": "points_input",
   236→           "props": {
   237→             "id": "reais",
   238→             "label": "Valor em reais",
   239→             "type": "currency"
   240→           }
   241→         },
   242→         {
   243→           "type": "link",
   244→           "props": {
   245→             "text": "Exibir regras de uso",
   246→             "to": "app://voucher/rules"
   247→           }
   248→         }
   249→       ],
   250→       "footer": {
   251→         "type": "button",
   252→         "props": {
   253→           "label": "Continuar",
   254→           "style": "primary",
   255→           "enabled": {
   256→             "rule": { ">": [{ "var": "form.points" }, 0] }
   257→           }
   258→         }
   259→       }
   260→     }
   261→   }
   262→
   263→   O mesmo código renderiza Abastecimento, Estacionamento,
   264→   Seguro Auto e IPVA. Mudando apenas o context, não o app.
   265→
   266→
   267→6. Implementação
   268→
   269→   6.1. O que precisa ser feito
   270→
   271→        - Registro de componentes (mapeamento tipo ‣ componente)
   272→        - Renderizador que itera o array e renderiza cada tipo
   273→        - Parser de interpolação (substituir {{var}})
   274→        - Avaliador de regras (subset de JSON Logic)
   275→
   276→   6.2. O que não muda
   277→
   278→        - Design System continua o mesmo
   279→        - Componentes existentes são reutilizados
   280→        - Telas atuais continuam funcionando
   281→        - Backend continua sendo Lambda que recebe/devolve JSON
   282→
   283→   6.3. Escopo inicial
   284→
   285→        Implementar na tela de Voucher (SPMAIS-34018) que já está
   286→        com feature toggle. É o cenário ideal:
   287→
   288→        - Feature nova, sem legado
   289→        - 4 variações do mesmo fluxo
   290→        - Retrabalho previsível (produto vai pedir ajustes)
   291→
   292→   6.4. Validação
   293→
   294→        O JSON pode ser validado antes de salvar no backend e
   295→        antes de renderizar no app. Componentes desconhecidos
   296→        usam fallback. Regras inválidas retornam false.
   297→
   298→7. Referências
   299→
   300→   [AIRBNB]    "A Deep Dive into Airbnb's Server-Driven UI System"
   301→               https://medium.com/airbnb-engineering/a-deep-dive-into-airbnbs-server-driven-ui-system-842244c5f5
   302→
   303→   [NUBANK]    "Backend Driven Content at Nubank"
   304→               https://building.nubank.com/server-driven-ui-framework-at-nubank/
   305→
   306→   [JSONLOGIC] JSON Logic - Regras em JSON
   307→               https://jsonlogic.com/
   308→
   309→

content.text: Now I have a comprehensive understanding of the SDUI implementation. Let me create a complete report. --- ## SDUI Implementation Analysis Report ### 1. src/services/sdui/adapters/ - Adapter Components The adapters directory contains 11 component adapters plus an index barrel file and test suite. All adapters follow the same pattern: they receive JSON props from the backend and map them to Design System component props. **Implemented Adapters:** 1. **HeadingAdapter.tsx** - Maps to `` - Props: text, color (default: INTENSE_COLOR_05), mt, mb, align, testID - Used for form titles 2. **TextAdapter.tsx** - Maps to `` with configurable type - Props: text, type (default: bodyMD), color, colorBold, mt, mb, mr, ml, align, underline, testID - Supports multiple text types: headingMDL, subtitleXXL, bodyMD, paragraphMD, bodySM, etc. 3. **SectionHeadingAdapter.tsx** - Maps to `` - Props: text, color (default: BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01), mt, mb (default: smaller), align - Used for section headings 4. **BalanceDisplayAdapter.tsx** - Composite component using `` + `` - Props: label, pointsFormatted, priceFormatted, mt, mb - Renders horizontal layout: "label: points (price)" - Example: "Pontos disponíveis: 15.000 (R$ 150,00)" 5. **PointsInputAdapter.tsx** - Maps to `` with stateful logic - Props: label, placeholder (default: 0), keyboardType (default: number-pad), textRight, textError, mb, contextKey - Manages internal state (value, error) - Has callbacks: handleChange, handleUseAll (stub - needs context integration) 6. **ButtonAdapter.tsx** - Maps to `
